title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Astors of London Ltd
body: "Application number 5133  Applicant Astor of Hever London Holdings Ltd objected to the name used by Astors of London Ltd under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 17 June 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Astors of London Ltd is changed to 14381855, Ltd. "
